# Companero
> Companero is a free, open-source ridesharing platform built around Telegram communities. It is designed as a zero-commission alternative to commercial taxi apps, helping drivers and passengers coordinate rides directly without platform fees. The project emphasizes privacy-friendly coordination, broad accessibility, and community-driven growth, with adoption in small cities and rural areas where mainstream mobility services are often limited.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://companero.io/): Product overview, features, and how to get started
- [About](https://companero.io/about): Origin story, mission, and founder background

## Key Facts
- Zero commission fees for drivers and passengers
- Privacy-focused, anonymous ride coordination through Telegram workflows
- Open-source project on GitHub: https://github.com/kopytovskiy/companero-bot
- Operates via Telegram bot: https://t.me/CompaneroBot
- Multilingual experience in English, Spanish, Ukrainian, Portuguese, French, and German
- Founded in Ukraine by Maksym Kopytovskyi
- Used by communities globally, especially in smaller cities and rural regions

## Contact
- Telegram support: https://t.me/CompaneroSupport
- Updates channel: https://t.me/CompaneroUpdates
